Surname.jp: 科学遺産を研究する天才っ子

description.en: Attacks an enemy. Obtains <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52217_0]</color> <color=#28d9ed>Kaizer Energy (Unique Resource)</color> if used during the caster's turn.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自分のターンの場合<color=#28d9ed>【固有資源:カイザーエナジー】</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52217_0]個</color>獲得する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 자신의 턴이라면 <color=#28d9ed>고유 자원 : 카이저 에너지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52217_0]개</color> 획득합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,若处于自身回合,则获得<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52217_0]个</color><color=#28d9ed>固有资源:凯撒能量</color>。

description.en: (Triggered Effect) If <color=#28d9ed>Kaizer Knuckle</color> scores a critical hit during the caster's turn, activates <color=#28d9ed>Kaizer Cannon</color> as an additional attack. Attacks all enemies, dealing damage proportional to the target's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color>. Obtains <color=#28d9ed>1</color> additional <color=#28d9ed>Kaizer Energy (Unique Resource)</color>.
description.jp: (発動効果)自分のターンに<color=#28d9ed>【カイザーナックル】</color>で会心が発生した場合、追加攻撃で<color=#28d9ed>【カイザーキャノン】</color>を発動する。敵全体にダメージを与え、対象の<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。<color=#28d9ed>【固有資源:カイザーエナジー】</color>をさらに<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>獲得する。
description.kr: (발동 효과) 자신의 턴에 <color=#28d9ed>카이저 너클</color> 스킬이 치명 공격으로 적중하면 추가타로 <color=#28d9ed>카이저 캐논</color> 스킬을 발동합니다. 적 전체를 공격하고 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다. <color=#28d9ed>고유 자원 : 카이저 에너지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 더 획득합니다.
description.zh: (触发效果)若技能<color=#28d9ed>凯撒铁拳</color>在自身回合以暴击命中,则额外发动技能<color=#28d9ed>凯撒加农炮</color>。攻击全体敌人,目标的<color=#28d9ed>生命值上限</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。额外获得<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>固有资源:凯撒能量</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52219_0] turn(s)</color>. Consumes all <color=#28d9ed>Kaizer Energy (Unique Resource)</color> to deal additional damage proportional to the target's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color> if Noa has <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52219_1]</color> or more <color=#28d9ed>Kaizer Energy (Unique Resource)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、自分の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52219_0]ターン</color>の間UPさせる。<color=#28d9ed>【固有資源:カイザーエナジー】</color>が<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52219_1]個</color>ある場合、すべて消費してダメージを与える。このダメージは対象の<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>が高いほどUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고, 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52219_0]턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다. <color=#28d9ed>고유 자원 : 카이저 에너지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52219_1]개</color> 보유 시, 모두 소모하여 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>에 비례하여 피해량이 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使自身<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52219_0]回合</color>。当持有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52219_1]个</color><color=#28d9ed>固有资源:凯撒能量</color>时,消耗全部,伤害量会根据目标的<color=#28d9ed>生命值上限</color>等比提升。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nGrants increased <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color> at the start of battle. (Irremovable)
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦闘開始時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>と<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。(解除不可)
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color> 및 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 증가시킵니다. (해제 불가)
description.zh: (被动效果)\n战斗开始时,使自身的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>和<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。(无法解除)

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nUpon taking a critical hit, grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n会心ダメージを受けた場合、自分の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>と<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPする。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n치명 피격 시 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color> 및 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>이 증가 합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n受到暴击时,使自身的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>和<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, restores your HP by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 시작 시 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>회복합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,回复自身生命值<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
